_comment: Recommended Claude Code settings for Power Apps code app projects. Apply these in your CLAUDE.md or settings.json.

hooks.command: node -e "const p = process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH || ''; if (p.includes('src/generated/') || p.includes('src\\generated\\')) { console.error('BLOCKED: ' + p + ' is a generated file. Never edit files under src/generated/ - they are overwritten by pac code add-data-source.'); process.exit(1); }"

cliNotes.pac: Always run pac via: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "pac ..." and never in bash. The pac CLI is a Windows executable.
cliNotes.pacInit: Use --environment (long form) not -e. Short flag -e is invalid in pac CLI 2.4.1+.
cliNotes.pacPush: Always require explicit user confirmation before running pac code push.
cliNotes.nodeVersion: Node.js v22+ required. Run node --version to check before scaffolding.
